BlastOutput.BlastOutput_reference: Stephen F. Altschul, Thomas L. Madden, Alejandro A. Schäffer, Jinghui Zhang, Zheng Zhang, Webb Miller, and David J. Lipman (1997), "Gapped BLAST and PSI-BLAST: a new generation of protein database search programs", Nucleic Acids Res. 25:3389-3402.

Hsp.Hsp_midline: P P +Y I+F GAT + F V+ L ++ I P+ GLP +RF+ V +SN +VT A+ T+ +VGY+AG+ + +F P+N+E AE I LFT ++ R+ + G L++LAG E+ LG PL ++ L ++ G
P +Y I+F GAT + F V+ L ++ I P+ GLP +RF+ V +SN +VT A+ T+ +VGY+AG+ + +F P+N+E AE I LFT ++ R+ + G L++LAG E+ LG PL ++ L ++ G
P +Y I+F GAT + F V+ L ++ I P+ GLP +RF+ V +SN +VT A+ T+ +VGY+AG+ + +F P+N+E AE I LFT ++ R+ + G L++LAG ED LG PL ++ L ++ G

Hit.Hit_def: Chain A, RICIN [Ricinus communis] >pdb|1IFT|A Chain A, RICIN [Ricinus communis] >pdb|1IFU|A Chain A, RICIN [Ricinus communis]

Hsp.Hsp_midline: VP +Y I+F GAT + F V+ L ++ I P+ GLP +RF+ V +SN +VT A+ T+ +VGY+AG+ + +F P+N+E AE I LFT ++ R+ + G L++LAG E+ LG PL ++ L ++ G
